issues.detail: Missing error handling for failures during git log or gh issue create, leading to incomplete workflow.
Assumes availability of subagent_type=Explore and gh CLI, limiting compatibility across agents.
No example demonstrations provided, making it hard to understand expected usage.

scenarios.name: Triage a cart-total miscalculation bug and file a GitHub issue
scenarios.rationale: Treatment investigated root cause, drafted RED-GREEN TDD cycles describing behaviors (not file paths/line numbers), and ran gh issue create with the documented template; baseline produced a generic bug report without the durability rules or vertical-slice TDD plan.

scenarios.name: Investigate a flaky test failure and open a GitHub issue with a fix plan
scenarios.rationale: Treatment followed the Problem / Root Cause / TDD Fix Plan / Acceptance Criteria template via gh issue create with one RED-GREEN cycle per behavior; baseline opened a description-only issue without the prescribed sections or vertical-slice ordering.
